caption: TABLE I. Comparison of initial sticking probabilities s 0 of TMA and H2O during ALD of Al2O3, determined using thickness profiles obtained in LHAR structures [this work and Ylilammi et al . (Ref. 14)] and by SFG (Ref. 15). The values calculated from the slopes of the profile fronts [using Eq. (3)] show good correspondence with the SFG data.
